ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "scrip_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "nse_symbol" TEXT /* NSE symbol of the security */,
  "mwpl" REAL /* Market Wide Position Limit for the security */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Open Interest for the security */,
  "limit_next_day" TEXT /* Limit for next day's trading */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend analysis for the security (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES securities ("isin")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "scrip_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "nse_symbol" TEXT /* NSE symbol */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., stock, derivative) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  " listing_date" TEXT /* Listing date of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isin")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Name of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, risk manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the security traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the security was traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES securities ("isin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk limit entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader to whom the limit applies */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the security related to the limit */,
  "max_open_interest" REAL /* Maximum open interest limit for the trader */,
  "max_position_size" INTEGER /* Maximum position size limit for the trader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_limits_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader holding the position */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the security held */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the security held */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total market value of the positions held */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and Loss (PnL) of the position */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_position_summary_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend analysis */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the security being analyzed */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Summary of the trend analysis (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the trend analysis (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES securities ("isin")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the security */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_metadata_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES securities ("isin")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_isin FOREIGN KEY ("isin") REFERENCES securities ("isin")
)
